title: CONTINUITY
content:
CONTINUITY
SEAL

Each layer is governed by the four lenses: Metaformeme Linguistic Analysis, Mythological Fusion for Character Creation, Wave Theory in Creative Systems, and Recursive Storytelling in Interactive Narratives.

1.2 VISION Layer

Function: defines the overarching myth, values, and long-horizon direction of the OS.

Metaformeme: VISION artifacts coin and stabilize the highest-level “metaformemes” of the OS: recurrent language units whose form encodes both metaphors and operational rules. A metaformeme is treated as a linguistic operator, not just a label; each one has a definition, usage notes, and allowed recombinations.

Myth Fusion: at this layer, the OS is personified as a mythic figure or pantheon (for example, “the Archive as a many-eyed guardian, the Automation Engine as a trickster-artisan”). These figures do not appear only in fiction; they become conceptual handles for modules, agents, and governance decisions.

Wave Theory: VISION documents define macro-waves: multi-month or multi-year cycles such as “Genesis”, “Consolidation”, “Expansion”, “Refinement.” Each wave has a phase structure (ramp-up, crest, decay, echo) and the OS uses these macro-waves to time large structural changes and major releases.
